message:
refactor(core): Overhaul config and utils modules for type consistency

## Config Module (src/config.ts)

Major refactoring to align with centralized types.ts definitions:

- REMOVED: Duplicate interface definitions (Config, SanitizationConfig,
  ScoringConfigSection, LLMProvider) - now imported from types.ts
- SIMPLIFIED: loadConfig() cascade logic - cleaner merge priority:
  defaults → global (~/.cass-memory/config.json) → repo (.cass/config.yaml) → CLI
- ADDED: getDefaultConfig() for creating default configuration instances
- ADDED: getUserConfigPath() helper for consistent path resolution
- ADDED: ensureConfigDirs() to create required directories atomically
- FIXED: Deep merge now properly handles nested sanitization config
- Reduced file from 356 lines to 190 lines (-46%) while maintaining
  full functionality

## Utils Module (src/utils.ts)

Targeted improvements for correctness and performance:

- REMOVED: extractAgentFromPath() function - now centralized in types.ts
  to prevent drift between implementations
- FIXED: ensureDir() simplified from try-access-catch-mkdir to single
  mkdir with recursive:true (atomic, idempotent)
- FIXED: truncate() edge case - handles maxLen < 3 gracefully
- IMPROVED: scoreBulletRelevance() token matching:
  * Exact word match now scores +3 (was +2)
  * Partial substring match now scores +1 (was +2)
  * Tags exact match preferred over contains
- IMPROVED: Tokenization now uses Set for O(1) lookup performance

These changes establish a cleaner foundation for the ACE pipeline
modules that depend on config and utils.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
